purpose: Structure founder-provided StillMind source material for product research.
Provide a safe bridge from spiritual/source concepts to ordinary user-facing product language.
Prepare a rights-reviewed metadata layer before any future retrieval or knowledge-grounded feature.

mayUseFor: future retrieval planning after demand validation and rights review
mustNotUseFor: diagnosis, treatment, trauma processing, or crisis care
quoting source passages in UI, App Store copy, marketing, analytics, or public docs without rights review
claiming the app knows a user's hidden cause, motive, karmic meaning, or metaphysical structure
globalRules.publicTranslationRule: Translate source concepts into plain language about attention, reaction loops, observer perspective, practice fit, and grounded action.

futureRagGates: validate seed-user demand before building retrieval
perform rights review before indexing passages
store only bounded, reviewed source chunks outside public repo
attach source-to-product mapping labels to every retrievable concept
run public-claim and source-boundary guards before release
keep user trigger text out of analytics and research notes
